items.title: Observability & Monitoring
items.description: Comprehensive guide to observability in distributed systems covering the three pillars (metrics, logs, traces), SLOs, alerting strategies, and Spring Boot Actuator + Micrometer setup.

items.title: Performance & Monitoring
items.description: Identifying slow queries, profiling tools, key metrics, connection pooling, and practical optimization workflow.

items.title: Time-Series Databases
items.description: Time-series data characteristics, storage optimizations, InfluxDB, TimescaleDB, Prometheus, and common time-series patterns.
